calls.title: Daily Facilio CAFM Workshops | Resolving Issues
calls.summary: The daily CAFM workshop on 10 May (Sunday) had CIT participants joined but the Facilio team was entirely absent due to the Sunday holiday coinciding with a Tamil Nadu public holiday. Nitish Soondur confirmed the situation with Ananth via WhatsApp and the session was deferred to Monday 11 May. No urgent issues were raised by the customer.
key_points: CIT team (Nitish Soondur, Vinay Mohan) joined the daily CAFM workshop on Sunday as scheduled.
No Facilio team members were available — confirmed by Ananth via WhatsApp: 'nobody is available from Facilio today, including him.'
Participants noted it was both a Sunday and a Tamil Nadu public holiday (Chief Minister appointment ceremony).
No urgent items were raised by the CIT side; Nitish offered Ananth could assist from Dubai if something urgent came up.
Session concluded in ~5 minutes with agreement to reconvene Monday morning.
decisions: CAFM workshop deferred to Monday 11 May 2026.
CIT to reach out directly if any urgent issue arises before Monday.

action_items.task: Resume daily CAFM workshop on Monday 11 May as scheduled
Confirm Facilio attendance for Monday session with CIT

risks: Facilio team absence on a scheduled customer-facing workshop day could set a precedent. Continuity of daily workshops depends on Facilio attendance; any further misses may erode CIT confidence.
open_items: Facilio team confirms availability for Monday session; CIT to flag any urgent items before then.
